programme.title: UFOs: Investigating the Unknown
programme.desc: U.S. nuclear missiles malfunction after an encounter.

programme.title: Insight
programme.desc: With soaring medical bills, waiting lists and an ageing population, how is our healthcare system coping and what will it look like in future? Insight hears from practitioners and patients caught in the healthcare cost crisis and asks who should pay the price?

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 International News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour
programme.desc: Reviews and analysis of the day's news presented by Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS) in the United States.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: As the team makes a potentially key discovery beneath a boulder on Lot 8, new clues arise that could identify who was behind the Oak Island mystery.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts season fourteen of 8 Out of 10 Cats. Jack Dee and Tom Allen take on Jon Richardson and Judi Love in the classic words and numbers quiz. John Cooper-Clarke joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers.

programme.title: American Godfathers: The Five Families
programme.desc: Episode 1 traces the American Mafia from early New York roots through Prohibition to the 1950s, exploring how violence, drugs and public hearings challenged their supposed code of honour.

programme.title: UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: For centuries archaeologists and explorers have been obsessed with locating cities lost to time. Some of these places are recorded in historical texts, while others are part of oral traditions and folklore. How does a once-thriving community become a lost city? And if their ruins are found, what secrets might be they reveal about human history?

programme.title: Theaters of War
programme.desc: If you've seen Top Gun or Transformers, you may have wondered: Does all of that military machinery on screen come with strings attached? Does the military actually get a crack at the script? Theaters of War digs deep into a vast new trove of recently released internal government documents to bring the answers to these questions into sharp focus.

programme.title: Dark Side of the 2000s
programme.sub-title: The Bachelor: Every Rose Has Its Thorn
programme.desc: Part game show, part reality TV and steered by producers willing to manipulate the truth and their participants, The Bachelor is a ratings machine.

programme.title: Dark Side of the 2000s
programme.desc: Two and A Half Men is a huge success until Charlie Sheen self-destructs. In a plot twist no one sees coming, he wages a public, hateful and violent war against his producer.

programme.title: NHK World English News
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.title: Al Jazeera News Hour
programme.desc: In-depth global news from Al Jazeera Satellite Network, Doha, Qatar, in English.

programme.title: TRT World News
programme.desc: The latest news from around the globe from TRT World, Istanbul, Turkiye, in English.

programme.title: DW English News
programme.desc: News and analysis of the top international and European news and current affairs from Berlin, in English.

programme.title: FBC News
programme.desc: Local, world, sport and entertainment news in English from FBC News, Suva Fiji.

programme.title: France 24 Feature
programme.desc: News feature in English from France 24, Paris.

programme.title: euronews
programme.desc: Headlines, Breaking News & Analysis from the Euronews news centre in Brussels, Belgium, in English.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.title: CBC The National
programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang from Toronto, Canada. Watch on SBS VICELAND at 08:40am everyday, also available on SBS OnDemand.

programme.title: BBC 6 O'Clock News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 English News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: David Stratton and Margaret Pomeranz review Salmonberries, The Favour, the Watch and the Very Big Fish, White Sands, Year of the Gun, Ruby and Rata. Plus interview with Ben Lewin.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton review A League of Their Own, Daydream Believer, Lethal Weapon 3, A Brief History of Time, Madame Bovary. Plus interviews with writers and directors.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton review Raising Cain and The Playboys. Plus Much Ado About Nothing set visit, interviews and Venice Film Festival report.

programme.title: DW The Day
programme.desc: DW The Day is a news show that helps you understand emerging stories from Europe, the US and across the globe, in English, no subtitles.

programme.title: Land of the Giants: Titans of Tech
programme.desc: By prioritising growth over all else, did Mark Zuckerberg create a platform for disinformation and divisiveness?

programme.title: Lee Lin Chin's Fashionista
programme.desc: This episode is about the punk trend in fashion, with interviews with Stacy Bearley and James Mylrea. They discuss the fact that many of these garments feature an aesthetic of the do-it-yourself, but also require some clever tailoring and technique.

programme.title: Bamay
programme.sub-title: Barkinji - Ngyiampaa - Mutthi Mutthi Country - Mungo NSW
programme.desc: Slow TV is back, celebrating stunning landscapes of Countries across Australia. Sit back and relax with the healing powers of Country.

programme.title: Where Are You Really From?
programme.desc: Michael starts his journey in Brisbane, home to one of the largest Vietnamese communities in the country, some surviving the trauma of the Vietnam War.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 International News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour
programme.desc: Reviews and analysis of the day's news presented by Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS) in the United States.

programme.title: Inside the Huddle
programme.desc: What is it like to be a footballer? Candid conversations, laughs, and insights that go beyond the game and into the outer.

programme.title: Over the Black Dot
programme.desc: In 2026, Over the Black Dot becomes a digital-first Rugby League yarn free-flowing conversations on footy, culture and community, with panellists and guests sharing authentic Indigenous stories.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Join host Jimmy Carr for season fourteen of 8 Out Of 10 Cats Does Countdown. Maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers. Richard Ayoade and Chris McCausland take on Jon Richardson and Sara Pascoe.

programme.title: Good Morning Vietnam
programme.desc: In 1965 Saigon, irreverent radio DJ Adrian Cronauer shakes up Armed Forces Radio with his wild humor, clashing with military censors while confronting the realities of the Vietnam War.

programme.title: Sex Before the Internet
programme.desc: Go inside Doc Johnson - the company that survived censorship, arrests and a fire to become one of the largest makers of sex toys in the U.S.

programme.title: Sex Before the Internet
programme.desc: The women of Nevada's legal brothels describe working for America's most famous pimp, Dennis Hof, at the Bunny Ranch - where anyone with a buck and a fantasy could visit.

programme.title: United Gangs of America
programme.desc: A massive fire at an apartment complex in LA exposes a vicious sect of the 18th Street Gang, setting off a chain reaction of chaos and bloodshed.

programme.title: United Gangs of America
programme.desc: Girls are choosing to join gangs in increasing numbers. Discover how they're breaking the glass ceiling and becoming ruthless killers.

programme.title: NHK World English News
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 English News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton review Riff Raff and Buffy the Vampire Slayer. Plus interview with Ken Loach and a feature on LGBTQ+ representation in film following Basic Instinct.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: David Stratton and Margaret Pomeranz review Boomerang, Blinky Bill, FernGully: The Last Rainforest, Universal Soldier, Scorchers. Plus interviews with Wayne Young and Jean-Claude Van Damme.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: David Stratton and Margaret Pomeranz review Light Sleeper, Wisecracks, The Power of One. Plus interview with Willem Dafoe and coverage of the Montreal Young Filmmakers Festival.

programme.title: Hostage Rescue
programme.desc: When a store closes for the night, workers find themselves trapped inside with armed robbers.

programme.title: Hostage Rescue
programme.desc: An American contractor in Iraq is kidnapped and held underground in a makeshift cell.

programme.title: Bamay
programme.desc: Bamay is back! See more stunning and diverse Australian locations from the Australian skies.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.sub-title: Gladiators Of The Forge: The Final Battles
programme.desc: The reigning champion has defeated six opponents, but now must face a returning challenger and forge the intricate Acinaces sword. With 50,000 dollars on the line, will our unbeaten champ lay claim to the Gladiator title once and for all or will a former competitor get his revenge?

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.
